SEARCH
Package ru.nsu.kiryushin.view

Class GameView

java.lang.Object
ru.nsu.kiryushin.view.GameView
public class GameView extends Object
JavaFX FXML controller: renders the board on a Canvas and routes input through GameController. Reads game state only via the controller and basic value types.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameView()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    handleInput(Direction direction)
    Routes a direction command from external input (keyboard, Arduino) to the controller.
    void
    initialize()
    FXML lifecycle hook: loads food and snake textures, then starts the first game.
    void
    restartGame()
    FXML button handler: hides the game-over overlay and starts a fresh game.
    void
    setTitleUpdater(Consumer<String> titleUpdater)
    Sets a callback the view uses to publish the score / speed HUD (typically wired to the primary Stage's title).

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • GameView

      public GameView()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      FXML lifecycle hook: loads food and snake textures, then starts the first game.

    • restartGame

      public void restartGame()
      FXML button handler: hides the game-over overlay and starts a fresh game.

    • setTitleUpdater

      public void setTitleUpdater(Consumer<String> titleUpdater)
      Sets a callback the view uses to publish the score / speed HUD (typically wired to the primary Stage's title). Called once per tick.
      Parameters:
      titleUpdater - consumer that receives the formatted HUD string

    • handleInput

      public void handleInput(Direction direction)
      Routes a direction command from external input (keyboard, Arduino) to the controller.
      Parameters:
      direction - requested direction
